title: koeleria dasyphylla subsp. nevadensis
intro: Koeleria dasyphylla subsp. nevadensis, also known as mountain hair grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Koeleria dasyphylla subsp. nevadensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
